llm_generation.note: The released 200K dataset used the historical preview endpoint. New public generation runs should use the non-preview gemini-3.1-flash-lite default unless explicitly overridden.

validation: python -m py_compile scripts/*.py generator/*.py tools/*.py experiments/**/*.py
notes: Strict public dataset excludes optional generated-world extra tables.
Large data artifacts are configured for Git LFS via .gitattributes.
MSCN/ZeroShot folders contain wrappers and summaries, not full checkpoints or external upstream code.
